svg.title: CertChain System Architecture
svg.desc: Three-layer architecture showing frontend, backend+database, and blockchain layers with data flow between them

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me about the landing page')
sendPrompt('Tell me about the verify certificate page')
sendPrompt('Tell me about the admin dashboard')
sendPrompt('Tell me about the issue certificate form')
sendPrompt('How does MetaMask wallet integration work?')
sendPrompt('Tell me about the Express backend API')
sendPrompt('Tell me about the PostgreSQL database schema')
sendPrompt('Explain the CertificateRegistry Solidity smart contract')
sendPrompt('What blockchain functions does the contract expose?')
